perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a 2D animation. It begins in an airport terminal where a woman with short black hair (the mom) tells her bald, thick-eyebrowed son that she has been learning Japanese via an app. (2) A transition shows the son feeling deeply moved, with a thought-bubble illustration of the mom studying by candlelight. (3) The scene shifts to a Japanese cafe where the mom approaches a male clerk to order. (4) The clerk speaks rapidly with a friendly smile, causing the mom to freeze with a blank expression. (5) She eventually only manages a single, hesitant word while the son shouts in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and lighthearted background music plays. A middle-aged female voice speaks Chinese excitedly about her self-study. A younger male voice responds with surprise. (2) The music continues as the male voice provides a sentimental internal monologue. (3) The soundscape changes to a cafe setting with light ambient noise. (4) A young male voice (the clerk) speaks Japanese at an extremely high speed and high pitch. (5) The female voice speaks a single Japanese word, 'Sumimasen', in a low, uncertain tone, followed by the male character's loud, distressed shout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top banner: '媽媽自發性學日文 太感動惹 (?)' (Mom spontaneously learning Japanese, so touching(?)). (2) Functional subtitles translate the dialogue: '兒子我跟你說... 每天都會用app學日文喔' (Son, let me tell you... I use an app to learn Japanese every day). (3) Decorative text: '兩個媽媽超開心嗎' (Are the two moms super happy?) and '首次挑戰自駕!' (First time challenging self-driving!). (4) Japanese text scrolls across the screen to represent the clerk's rapid speech. (5) Bottom text: '帶學長媽媽去日本' (Bringing senior's mom to Japan).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Dialogue in airport -> Sentimental flashback/imagination -> Action at cafe counter -> Comedic failure

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 bald main character (male), 1 short-haired mom (female), 1 cafe clerk (male), 1 extra mom character in the bottom comic panel (female).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A bald man with extremely thick black eyebrows wearing a black t-shirt; a middle-aged woman with short black hair and a pink t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An airport departure hall with a flight information display; a wooden-themed Japanese cafe counter with a menu listing prices in Yen.

vocal_qualities.pitch: Varied (Son: Low, Mom: Medium, Clerk: High)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Expectation -> Setup -> Reality Check -> Punchline
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous animated short designed to entertain by depicting the 'Expectation vs. Reality' trope of language learning. It captures the ironic contrast between a mother's pride in her self-study efforts and her total inability to comprehend a native speaker's rapid speech in a real-world setting.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Distinctive character design of the son (bald with thick eyebrows) which is consistent across the creator's series.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a split-screen or paneled layout typical of social media comics, where the bottom part remains relatively static while the top part animates the story.
